investigation_summary: Top-tier plastic polluter in brand audits. $3.9B IRS transfer pricing dispute (Puerto Rico) per SEC. Aquafina tap-water labeling; Naked Juice "natural" settlements. Sued Indian farmers over proprietary potato (later dropped). Predominantly UPF portfolio; glyphosate in oats litigation thread.

profile.tax_summary: FY2023 ~20% effective; Ireland holding; Puerto Rico manufacturing; $3.9B IRS dispute disclosed. Good Jobs First $55M+ subsidies.
profile.legal_summary: Aquafina / marketing; Tropicana class actions; DOJ distributor price-fixing agreement; Naked Juice settlements; India farmer suits.
profile.labor_summary: Potato & oat supply chain farmworker concerns; India legal battle criticized.
profile.environmental_summary: Plastic footprint; failed 2025 virgin-plastic pledges in key lanes per reporting; CDP Climate B (2023).
profile.political_summary: ~$4.2M lobbying (2023); funded research downplaying sugar per CSPI-style critiques.
profile.product_health: High-sugar beverages; ultra-processed snacks; sodium serving-size games; oats/glyphosate class action headline risk.
